forecast_text.text: Partly cloudy, then becoming cloudy, with a high near 86 around 3pm.
Slight chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 59. Breezy at the cove, north-northeast gusts to 16 mph.
Slight chance of rain. Sunny, with a high near 80. Calm at the cove despite west gusts to 26 mph.
Chance of rain between 7pm and 8pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 64. Calm at the cove despite west-northwest gusts to 28 mph.
Sunny, then becoming cloudy, with a high near 69 around 5pm. Very windy at the cove, north-northwest gusts to 30 mph.
Mostly clear, with a low around 58. South-southeast wind around 4 mph, with gusts as high as 15 mph.
Mostly sunny, then sunny, with a high near 81. West-northwest wind 1 to 11 mph.
Mostly clear, with a low around 63. South-southeast wind 4 to 8 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.
Partly cloudy, with a high near 85. West-northwest wind 2 to 9 mph.
Slight chance of rain. Overcast, with a low around 65. Calm at the cove despite west-southwest gusts to 26 mph.
Slight chance of rain. Overcast, with a high near 81. Southwest wind 6 to 11 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.
Mostly cloudy, with a low around 65. South-southwest wind 5 to 11 mph, with gusts as high as 17 mph.
Mostly sunny, with a high near 80. Southwest wind 5 to 9 mph.
Overcast, with a low around 73. Calm at the cove despite south gusts to 27 mph.

briefing.headline: Hot today, rain moves in tomorrow evening.
briefing.subheadline: Expect mid-80s this afternoon, staying calm, with showers arriving around Sunday evening.
